problem: Why does biological neural computation use 20W while AI uses megawatts — what is different?
hypothesis: Combining Neuromorphic spike-timing dependent plasticity with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Hardware prototype with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
